---
title: "Lacerda_project"
author: "Matheus Ardigueri"
date: "2026-04-17"
output: html_document
---

# Importing Libraries and setting up

```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
library(performance)
```

## Importing dataframe

```{r}
df <- read_csv("../data/plots_csv.csv")

names(df)
```
```{r}
df
```


## EDA


```{r}
df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(c(NDVI, SAVI),
               names_to = "indices",
               values_to = "values")

indices <- ggplot(data =  df_long, 
                  aes(x = Date,
                      y = values,
                      color = indices)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    x = "Dates",
    y = "Index Values"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = c(0.9,0.9))

indices

ggsave(filename = "../output/boxplot_eda.png",
       plot = indices,
       dpi = 600)
```


```{r}
linmod <- lmer(Yield ~ NDVI + SAVI + Elevation + (1|Rep),
               data = df)

summary(linmod)
```


```{r}
# R²
r2(linmod)

# RMSE (with random effects)
rmse(df$Yield, predict(linmod))

# RMSE (fixed effects only)
rmse(df$Yield, predict(linmod, re.form = NA))
```

```{r}
df$pred <- predict(linmod)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Yield, y = pred)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  labs(
    x = "Observed Yield",
    y = "Predicted Yield",
    title = "Observed vs Predicted Yield"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
